examples.text: or manipulating numbers in a structured and purposeful way, like adding two numbers together. These operations are handled by a computer’s Arithmetic and Logic Unit, but most people call it by its street name: the ALU. The ALU is the mathematical brain of a computer. When you understand an ALU’s design and function, you’ll understand a fundamental
